scripts.postbuild: cp openclaw.plugin.json ../../../../.openclaw/extensions/usme-claw/openclaw.plugin.json && cp ../../node_modules/tiktoken/tiktoken_bg.wasm ../../../../.openclaw/extensions/usme-claw/dist/tiktoken_bg.wasm && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('../../../../.openclaw/extensions/usme-claw/package.json', JSON.stringify({name:'usme-claw',version:'0.1.0',type:'commonjs',main:'dist/plugin.cjs',openclaw:{extensions:['./dist/plugin.cjs']}}, null, 2))" && node scripts/patch-claude-flow-oauth.mjs
